resumeContact.note: Optional: what the resume PDF header shows (forms still use all links). Omit to show everything.

eeo.note: Optional demographic answers. Leave any field null to have the bot pause and ask rather than guess.

voice.note: A short sample of the user's own writing so cover letters sound like them, not like an LLM.
voice.sample: I lead with outcomes, not adjectives. I write in plain, direct sentences and I'd rather say 'grew signups 40%' than 'passionate about growth.' A little dry humour is fine; buzzwords are not.
